title: The very weird pack...
description:
Alright, so this mod is of course, very strange and random...

the strange stuff includes: a very (random) non projectile weapon (even though its not :D)

not very weird ambeince mobs....

2 new white deco blocks.

and a non working sponge...
(nomorespace)
body:
![little ant (and something else)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33392cd959e74db9f9afe74fd98323ae5c86531a.png)Ah yes! a very weird and random mod.... which includes:
Slingshot
a (few) new ambeince mobs
2 new blocks
and of course, a non working sponge....

its a very small modpack... but i might add more stuff later.

OH and also 2 new structures (for legal purposes the area where they spawn is hidden) ![two new blocks ( and a weapon you can see)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9879c1a9b2b0ff9399022b05531b4486b9065ec2.png)
